extract: Dragon Claw (Japanese: ドラゴンクロー Dragon Claw) is a damage-dealing Dragon-type move introduced in Generation III. It is: TM02 from Generation III to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl, as well as in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. TR47 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM078 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.
